title: Maid Of Honour

jokes.text: John, it's practically obsidian in here! / You just said close the curtains!
jokes.setup: Moira dramatically asks Johnny to close curtains, then immediately complains about darkness
jokes.punchline: Johnny's exasperated pointing out of the contradiction
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment for Moira's dramatic contradictions and Johnny's long-suffering patience. Great economy and structure.

jokes.text: I don't remember any of this...?
jokes.setup: Moira eagerly watches her movie trailer
jokes.punchline: She doesn't recognize her own movie because it's just an ad
jokes.explanation: Excellent setup/payoff structure with perfect character beats

jokes.text: It's halted. Someone hit resume. - Just let it buffer.
jokes.setup: Family trying to watch important trailer on bad internet
jokes.punchline: Technical difficulties deflate the dramatic moment
jokes.explanation: Relatable modern frustration that punctures the drama

jokes.text: Oh, this is a no way an optimal viewing experience.
jokes.setup: Technology keeps failing during movie viewing
jokes.punchline: Moira's pretentious way of saying 'this sucks'
jokes.explanation: Classic Moira vocabulary - ornate language for simple frustration

jokes.text: Like think of all the people on the planet who find someone, somehow you're one of those people.
jokes.setup: Alexis congratulating David on finding love
jokes.punchline: Backhanded compliment suggesting his romantic success is miraculous
jokes.explanation: Perfect sibling relationship humor - supportive yet cutting

jokes.text: I mean, you didn't end up marrying JC Chasez or Jenna Elfman. But I actually feel like Patrick is kind of the best of both of them.
jokes.setup: Alexis trying to compliment David's choice in Patrick
jokes.punchline: Comparing Patrick to random early 2000s celebrities from David's dream book
jokes.explanation: Absurd pop culture references that feel authentically Alexis

jokes.text: Well, if it isn't our very own little JC Chasez.
jokes.setup: Patrick enters after JC Chasez was just mentioned
jokes.punchline: Alexis immediately applies the comparison to real Patrick
jokes.explanation: Quick callback that extends the absurd comparison

jokes.text: If you say Ronnie... - Oh, I don't think she would have said yes. - Does not like him.
jokes.setup: Alexis guessing who David asked to be maid of honor
jokes.punchline: Universal agreement that Ronnie dislikes David
jokes.explanation: Quick group dynamic joke about established character relationship

jokes.text: David, you better be talking about Stevie Nicks.
jokes.setup: David says he asked Stevie to be maid of honor
jokes.punchline: Alexis hoping for the famous Stevie, not local Stevie
jokes.explanation: Perfect economy and character voice - Alexis would genuinely hope for the celebrity

jokes.text: Fine. But I don't want any hurt feelings. Because the last thing we need right now is interpersonal conflict eclipsing my... our day.
jokes.setup: David agreeing to let Alexis talk to Stevie
jokes.punchline: Slip revealing his narcissistic focus on 'my day' not 'our day'
jokes.explanation: Classic David self-centeredness with perfect correction beat

jokes.text: Imagine what I could do with your bachelor party, David. Diplo still sends me nudes.
jokes.setup: Alexis offering to help with wedding planning
jokes.punchline: Casual mention of celebrity DJ sending nude photos
jokes.explanation: Perfectly absurd Alexis overshare delivered with casual confidence

jokes.text: Who am I, you buying your car?
jokes.setup: Roland defending his investment choices
jokes.punchline: Calling out Johnny's previous bad financial decision
jokes.explanation: Good character-specific burn based on established history

jokes.text: If we're gonna split it up, I call the money.
jokes.setup: Roland and Johnny discover money and a gun
jokes.punchline: Roland immediately wants to split the criminal evidence
jokes.explanation: Perfect Roland logic - completely missing the ethical issues

jokes.text: I left a pack of chewing gum at the movie theatre two weeks ago, and I haven't gone back for it.
jokes.setup: Johnny argues someone will return for their belongings
jokes.punchline: Roland's completely irrelevant counterexample
jokes.explanation: Excellent Roland logic fail - equating gum with criminal money

jokes.text: It's called global warming, Johnny.
jokes.setup: Johnny notes the coffee is still hot
jokes.punchline: Roland blames global warming for hot coffee
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurd logic that's perfectly in character for Roland

jokes.text: Or gal. This is the 21st century, Johnny.
jokes.setup: Roland suggesting they stake out the criminal
jokes.punchline: Suddenly becoming progressive about gender assumptions
jokes.explanation: Funny character inconsistency - Roland being progressive at odd moment

jokes.text: Thanks in large part to the thaumaturgy of our special effects department.
jokes.setup: Moira explaining her movie performance
jokes.punchline: Using 'thaumaturgy' (magic/miracles) for basic special effects
jokes.explanation: Peak Moira vocabulary - obscure word for simple concept

jokes.text: Credit the technical wizardry of our team of imaginators.
jokes.setup: Continuing to praise the movie's effects
jokes.punchline: Made-up word 'imaginators' for special effects team
jokes.explanation: Classic Moira invented word that sounds profound but is nonsense

jokes.text: What a human beak can do?
jokes.setup: Discussing her performance in the crow movie
jokes.punchline: The implication she's wearing some kind of human beak prosthetic
jokes.explanation: Absurd visual concept delivered with Moira's characteristic pride in bizarre artistic choices.

jokes.text: though the adulation does appear to be unanimous.
jokes.setup: Moira noting everyone's positive reaction to her movie
jokes.punchline: Using pretentious language while fishing for more compliments
jokes.explanation: Moira's transparent need for validation dressed in fancy words

jokes.text: Well... it looked just like a real movie.
jokes.setup: Everyone waiting for Jocelyn's opinion of the trailer
jokes.punchline: Accidentally damning with faint praise
jokes.explanation: Perfect unintentional insult - implying it usually doesn't look like real movies

jokes.text: Now there is the quote for the sizzle reel!
jokes.setup: Jocelyn gives backhanded compliment
jokes.punchline: Moira enthusiastically misses the insult
jokes.explanation: Great character obliviousness - Moira missing obvious slight

jokes.text: My uncle had a parrot that just kept asking me to take my bra off.
jokes.setup: Moira asking if the crows were nice
jokes.punchline: Twyla's completely unrelated bird trauma story
jokes.explanation: Classic Twyla overshare that's both innocent and inappropriate

jokes.text: You do know that 'Pan Am' was cancelled after a season, right?
jokes.setup: Stevie wearing flight attendant uniform
jokes.punchline: David's TV knowledge used as insult about her career choice
jokes.explanation: Good character-specific knowledge used for cutting remark

jokes.text: So how safe can the plane be if I'm the one in charge of saving people's lives?
jokes.setup: Stevie explaining her new flight attendant job
jokes.punchline: Self-aware about her unsuitability for the role
jokes.explanation: Perfect Stevie self-awareness and dark humor about responsibility

jokes.text: Did you know that Larry Air has 18 ongoing lawsuits? One of which is from Larry himself.
jokes.setup: Stevie listing problems with her airline
jokes.punchline: Even the owner is suing his own company
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation joke with perfect absurd detail

jokes.text: How honest do you want us to be?
jokes.setup: Stevie asking what's wrong with her
jokes.punchline: David's fake consideration before brutal honesty
jokes.explanation: Classic David cutting remark with perfect timing

jokes.text: Do you realize that this soda is made with 99% real drink. You can't argue with that kind of math.
jokes.setup: Roland defending his snack choices
jokes.punchline: Nonsensical marketing claim treated as impressive
jokes.explanation: Perfect Roland logic - impressed by meaningless percentage

jokes.text: Your sexist instincts were right as usual.
jokes.setup: They see a male squatter approaching
jokes.punchline: Roland 'complimenting' Johnny's gender assumptions
jokes.explanation: Callback to Roland's earlier progressive stance, now abandoned

jokes.text: Just the look in your eyes sent a chilling, wet gust of raspberries to my face.
jokes.setup: Moira confronting Jocelyn about not liking her movie
jokes.punchline: Overly dramatic description of receiving a dismissive look
jokes.explanation: Peak Moira metaphor - completely over-the-top but perfectly in character

jokes.text: Not 'The Love Guru'?
jokes.setup: Jocelyn mentions Michael Myers movie trauma
jokes.punchline: Moira confuses horror Michael Myers with Mike Myers
jokes.explanation: Perfect character confusion between horror and comedy actors

jokes.text: I once hooked up with three different GQ Men of the Year. At the GQ Men of the Year party.
jokes.setup: Alexis giving fashion advice
jokes.punchline: Casual mention of impressive romantic efficiency at one event
jokes.explanation: Perfect Alexis casual brag with specific absurd detail

jokes.text: I once planned Megan Fox's bachelorette on this tiny island off the coast of Montenegro where nothing is illegal. Like nothing.
jokes.setup: Alexis describing her party planning experience
jokes.punchline: Casual mention of lawless international party destination
jokes.explanation: Classic Alexis over-the-top past experience with ominous implications

jokes.text: Oh my God, Stevie. I get why you and everyone else would be asking that question, but the answer is... like maybe?
jokes.setup: Stevie asking if Alexis should take over maid of honor duties
jokes.punchline: Alexis's completely unhelpful honest answer
jokes.explanation: Alexis self-awareness paired with complete lack of decisiveness

jokes.text: I'm now unemployed in my thirties. For the second time in a week.
jokes.setup: Stevie reflecting on her life choices
jokes.punchline: Matter-of-fact delivery of being twice unemployed rapidly
jokes.explanation: Perfect Stevie deadpan delivery of genuinely depressing situation

jokes.text: Oh my God. Since when did James Bond shop at Elm Glenn?
jokes.setup: Patrick tries on a suit
jokes.punchline: Alexis comparing small-town store to high-end Bond outfitting
jokes.explanation: Good visual compliment that plays with expectations

jokes.text: And by the way, whatever you're doing is A-okay with me. But unfortunately Professor Prude here is not too keen on 'squatters.'
jokes.setup: Roland trying to smooth talk the armed criminal
jokes.punchline: Calling Johnny 'Professor Prude' to criminal's face
jokes.explanation: Roland throwing Johnny under the bus with creative nickname

jokes.text: Or gals. - No, never women.
jokes.setup: Prosecutor mentions putting away criminals
jokes.punchline: Roland's progressive correction immediately shut down
jokes.explanation: Perfect callback to Roland's performative progressiveness being shut down

jokes.text: Good job, Roland. - You're a professional, Roland.
jokes.setup: Johnny grudgingly compliments Roland
jokes.punchline: Roland demanding increasingly specific praise
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Roland's need for validation

jokes.text: From the first ominous syllable of the narrator's tale, one can feel the hair on one's arms standing at affrighted attention.
jokes.setup: Jocelyn writing movie review to make Moira happy
jokes.punchline: Attempting Moira's pretentious vocabulary style with mixed success
jokes.explanation: Jocelyn attempting to mimic Moira's style with earnest effort

jokes.text: One even tried to mate.
jokes.setup: Moira describing crows accepting her on set
jokes.punchline: Casual mention of bird attempting to mate with her
jokes.explanation: Perfect Moira delivery of disturbing information as casual fact

jokes.text: I think it would be a weird look for me to be a flower girl at my age, David.
jokes.setup: David offering Alexis a better wedding job
jokes.punchline: Alexis assuming the most junior role possible
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection showing Alexis missing the significance of the offer

jokes.text: Like come out first, wearing a gown made entirely of flowers... and loop back... and then quick outfit change, and we're up.
jokes.setup: Alexis still thinking about flower girl role
jokes.punchline: Elaborate plan to do multiple wedding roles with costume changes
jokes.explanation: Classic Alexis over-planning with theatrical flair

tmdb_overview: Moira shares the newly released “Crows” movie trailer with the Jazzagals. Johnny and Roland find a suspicious bag of money at the new motel.
insight: Wedding prep chaos yields 43 jokes in 43 minutes—character comedy sustains the episode.
